lines.gurmukhi: ਤੂੰ ਬੇਅੰਤੁ ਅਤਿ ਮੂਚੋ ਮੂਚਾ ॥
lines.translit: toon beant at moocho moochaa |
lines.english: You are Infinite, You are Everything!

lines.gurmukhi: ਹਉ ਕੁਰਬਾਣੀ ਤੇਰੈ ਵੰਞਾ ਨਾਨਕ ਦਾਸ ਦਸਾਵਣਿਆ ॥੮॥੧॥੩੫॥
lines.translit: hau kurabaanee terai vanyaa naanak daas dasaavaniaa |8|1|35|
lines.english: I am a sacrifice to You. Nanak is the slave of Your slaves. ||8||1||35||

lines.gurmukhi: ਤੂੰ ਵਡਾ ਤੂੰ ਊਚੋ ਊਚਾ ॥
lines.translit: toon vaddaa toon aoocho aoochaa |
lines.english: You are so Great! You are the Highest of the High!

lines.gurmukhi: ਕਉਣੁ ਸੁ ਮੁਕਤਾ ਕਉਣੁ ਸੁ ਜੁਗਤਾ ॥
lines.translit: kaun su mukataa kaun su jugataa |
lines.english: Who is liberated, and who is united?

lines.gurmukhi: ਮਾਝ ਮਹਲਾ ੫ ॥
lines.translit: maajh mahalaa 5 |
lines.english: Maajh, Fifth Mehl:

lines.gurmukhi: ਕਉਣੁ ਸੁ ਗਿਆਨੀ ਕਉਣੁ ਸੁ ਬਕਤਾ ॥
lines.translit: kaun su giaanee kaun su bakataa |
lines.english: Who is a spiritual teacher, and who is a preacher?

lines.gurmukhi: ਕਉਣੁ ਸੁ ਗਿਰਹੀ ਕਉਣੁ ਉਦਾਸੀ ਕਉਣੁ ਸੁ ਕੀਮਤਿ ਪਾਏ ਜੀਉ ॥੧॥
lines.translit: kaun su girahee kaun udaasee kaun su keemat paae jeeo |1|
lines.english: Who is a house-holder, and who is a renunciate? Who can estimate the Lord's Value? ||1||

lines.gurmukhi: ਕਿਨਿ ਬਿਧਿ ਬਾਧਾ ਕਿਨਿ ਬਿਧਿ ਛੂਟਾ ॥
lines.translit: kin bidh baadhaa kin bidh chhoottaa |
lines.english: How is one bound, and how is one freed of his bonds?

lines.gurmukhi: ਕਿਨਿ ਬਿਧਿ ਆਵਣੁ ਜਾਵਣੁ ਤੂਟਾ ॥
lines.translit: kin bidh aavan jaavan toottaa |
lines.english: How can one escape from the cycle of coming and going in reincarnation?

lines.gurmukhi: ਕਉਣ ਕਰਮ ਕਉਣ ਨਿਹਕਰਮਾ ਕਉਣੁ ਸੁ ਕਹੈ ਕਹਾਏ ਜੀਉ ॥੨॥
lines.translit: kaun karam kaun nihakaramaa kaun su kahai kahaae jeeo |2|
lines.english: Who is subject to karma, and who is beyond karma? Who chants the Name, and inspires others to chant it? ||2||

lines.gurmukhi: ਕਉਣੁ ਸੁ ਸੁਖੀਆ ਕਉਣੁ ਸੁ ਦੁਖੀਆ ॥
lines.translit: kaun su sukheea kaun su dukheea |
lines.english: Who is happy, and who is sad?

lines.gurmukhi: ਕਉਣੁ ਸੁ ਸਨਮੁਖੁ ਕਉਣੁ ਵੇਮੁਖੀਆ ॥
lines.translit: kaun su sanamukh kaun vemukheea |
lines.english: Who, as sunmukh, turns toward the Guru, and who, as vaymukh, turns away from the Guru?

lines.gurmukhi: ਕਿਨਿ ਬਿਧਿ ਮਿਲੀਐ ਕਿਨਿ ਬਿਧਿ ਬਿਛੁਰੈ ਇਹ ਬਿਧਿ ਕਉਣੁ ਪ੍ਰਗਟਾਏ ਜੀਉ ॥੩॥
lines.translit: kin bidh mileeai kin bidh bichhurai ih bidh kaun pragattaae jeeo |3|
lines.english: How can one meet the Lord? How is one separated from Him? Who can reveal the way to me? ||3||

lines.gurmukhi: ਕਉਣੁ ਸੁ ਅਖਰੁ ਜਿਤੁ ਧਾਵਤੁ ਰਹਤਾ ॥
lines.translit: kaun su akhar jit dhaavat rahataa |
lines.english: What is that Word, by which the wandering mind can be restrained?

lines.gurmukhi: ਕਉਣੁ ਸੁ ਚਾਲ ਜਿਤੁ ਪਾਰਬ੍ਰਹਮੁ ਧਿਆਏ ਕਿਨਿ ਬਿਧਿ ਕੀਰਤਨੁ ਗਾਏ ਜੀਉ ॥੪॥
lines.translit: kaun su chaal jit paarabraham dhiaae kin bidh keeratan gaae jeeo |4|
lines.english: What is that lifestyle, by which we may come to meditate on the Supreme Lord? How may we sing the Kirtan of His Praises? ||4||

lines.gurmukhi: ਕਉਣੁ ਉਪਦੇਸੁ ਜਿਤੁ ਦੁਖੁ ਸੁਖੁ ਸਮ ਸਹਤਾ ॥
lines.translit: kaun upades jit dukh sukh sam sahataa |
lines.english: What are those teachings, by which we may endure pain and pleasure alike?

lines.gurmukhi: ਗੁਰਮੁਖਿ ਮੁਕਤਾ ਗੁਰਮੁਖਿ ਜੁਗਤਾ ॥
lines.translit: guramukh mukataa guramukh jugataa |
lines.english: The Gurmukh is liberated, and the Gurmukh is linked.

lines.gurmukhi: ਗੁਰਮੁਖਿ ਗਿਆਨੀ ਗੁਰਮੁਖਿ ਬਕਤਾ ॥
lines.translit: guramukh giaanee guramukh bakataa |
lines.english: The Gurmukh is the spiritual teacher, and the Gurmukh is the preacher.

lines.gurmukhi: ਹਉਮੈ ਬਾਧਾ ਗੁਰਮੁਖਿ ਛੂਟਾ ॥
lines.translit: haumai baadhaa guramukh chhoottaa |
lines.english: Egotism is bondage; as Gurmukh, one is emancipated.

lines.gurmukhi: ਗੁਰਮੁਖਿ ਆਵਣੁ ਜਾਵਣੁ ਤੂਟਾ ॥
lines.translit: guramukh aavan jaavan toottaa |
lines.english: The Gurmukh escapes the cycle of coming and going in reincarnation.

lines.gurmukhi: ਧੰਨੁ ਗਿਰਹੀ ਉਦਾਸੀ ਗੁਰਮੁਖਿ ਗੁਰਮੁਖਿ ਕੀਮਤਿ ਪਾਏ ਜੀਉ ॥੫॥
lines.translit: dhan girahee udaasee guramukh guramukh keemat paae jeeo |5|
lines.english: Blessed is the Gurmukh, the householder and the renunciate. The Gurmukh knows the Lord's Value. ||5||

lines.gurmukhi: ਗੁਰਮੁਖਿ ਸੁਖੀਆ ਮਨਮੁਖਿ ਦੁਖੀਆ ॥
lines.translit: guramukh sukheea manamukh dukheea |
lines.english: The Gurmukh is happy, while the self-willed manmukh is sad.

lines.gurmukhi: ਗੁਰਮੁਖਿ ਕਰਮ ਗੁਰਮੁਖਿ ਨਿਹਕਰਮਾ ਗੁਰਮੁਖਿ ਕਰੇ ਸੁ ਸੁਭਾਏ ਜੀਉ ॥੬॥
lines.translit: guramukh karam guramukh nihakaramaa guramukh kare su subhaae jeeo |6|
lines.english: The Gurmukh performs actions of good karma, and the Gurmukh is beyond karma. Whatever the Gurmukh does, is done in good faith. ||6||

lines.gurmukhi: ਗੁਰਮੁਖਿ ਮਿਲੀਐ ਮਨਮੁਖਿ ਵਿਛੁਰੈ ਗੁਰਮੁਖਿ ਬਿਧਿ ਪ੍ਰਗਟਾਏ ਜੀਉ ॥੭॥
lines.translit: guramukh mileeai manamukh vichhurai guramukh bidh pragattaae jeeo |7|
lines.english: The Gurmukh is united with the Lord, while the manmukh is separated from Him. The Gurmukh reveals the way. ||7||

lines.gurmukhi: ਗੁਰਮੁਖਿ ਸਨਮੁਖੁ ਮਨਮੁਖਿ ਵੇਮੁਖੀਆ ॥
lines.translit: guramukh sanamukh manamukh vemukheea |
lines.english: The Gurmukh turns toward the Guru, and the self-willed manmukh turns away from the Guru.

lines.gurmukhi: ਗੁਰਮੁਖਿ ਅਖਰੁ ਜਿਤੁ ਧਾਵਤੁ ਰਹਤਾ ॥
lines.translit: guramukh akhar jit dhaavat rahataa |
lines.english: The Guru's Instruction is the Word, by which the wandering mind is restrained.

lines.gurmukhi: ਗੁਰਮੁਖਿ ਉਪਦੇਸੁ ਦੁਖੁ ਸੁਖੁ ਸਮ ਸਹਤਾ ॥
lines.translit: guramukh upades dukh sukh sam sahataa |
lines.english: Through the Guru's Teachings, we can endure pain and pleasure alike.

lines.gurmukhi: ਸਗਲੀ ਬਣਤ ਬਣਾਈ ਆਪੇ ॥
lines.translit: sagalee banat banaaee aape |
lines.english: The Lord Himself created the entire creation.

lines.gurmukhi: ਗੁਰਮੁਖਿ ਚਾਲ ਜਿਤੁ ਪਾਰਬ੍ਰਹਮੁ ਧਿਆਏ ਗੁਰਮੁਖਿ ਕੀਰਤਨੁ ਗਾਏ ਜੀਉ ॥੮॥
lines.translit: guramukh chaal jit paarabraham dhiaae guramukh keeratan gaae jeeo |8|
lines.english: To live as Gurmukh is the lifestyle by which we come to meditate on the Supreme Lord. The Gurmukh sings the Kirtan of His Praises. ||8||

lines.gurmukhi: ਇਕਸੁ ਤੇ ਹੋਇਓ ਅਨੰਤਾ ਨਾਨਕ ਏਕਸੁ ਮਾਹਿ ਸਮਾਏ ਜੀਉ ॥੯॥੨॥੩੬॥
lines.translit: eikas te hoeo anantaa naanak ekas maeh samaae jeeo |9|2|36|
lines.english: From oneness, He has brought forth the countless multitudes. O Nanak, they shall merge into the One once again. ||9||2||36||

lines.gurmukhi: ਆਪੇ ਕਰੇ ਕਰਾਏ ਥਾਪੇ ॥
lines.translit: aape kare karaae thaape |
lines.english: He Himself acts, and causes others to act. He Himself establishes.

lines.gurmukhi: ਮਾਝ ਮਹਲਾ ੫ ॥
lines.translit: maajh mahalaa 5 |
lines.english: Maajh, Fifth Mehl:

lines.gurmukhi: ਹਰਿ ਭਗਵੰਤਾ ਤਾ ਜਨੁ ਖਰਾ ਸੁਖਾਲਾ ॥
lines.translit: har bhagavantaa taa jan kharaa sukhaalaa |
lines.english: The Lord is Wealthy and Prosperous, so His humble servant should feel totally secure.

lines.gurmukhi: ਪ੍ਰਭੁ ਅਬਿਨਾਸੀ ਤਾ ਕਿਆ ਕਾੜਾ ॥
lines.translit: prabh abinaasee taa kiaa kaarraa |
lines.english: God is Eternal and Imperishable, so why should anyone be anxious?

lines.gurmukhi: ਹਉ ਵਾਰੀ ਜੀਉ ਵਾਰੀ ਗੁਰਮੁਖਿ ਮਨਿ ਤਨਿ ਭਾਵਣਿਆ ॥
lines.translit: hau vaaree jeeo vaaree guramukh man tan bhaavaniaa |
lines.english: I am a sacrifice, my soul is a sacrifice, to that Gurmukh whose mind and body are pleased with You.

lines.gurmukhi: ਜੀਅ ਪ੍ਰਾਨ ਮਾਨ ਸੁਖਦਾਤਾ ਤੂੰ ਕਰਹਿ ਸੋਈ ਸੁਖੁ ਪਾਵਣਿਆ ॥੧॥
lines.translit: jeea praan maan sukhadaataa toon kareh soee sukh paavaniaa |1|
lines.english: O Giver of peace of the soul, of life, of honor-as You ordain, I obtain peace. ||1||

lines.gurmukhi: ਤੂੰ ਮੇਰਾ ਪਰਬਤੁ ਤੂੰ ਮੇਰਾ ਓਲਾ ਤੁਮ ਸੰਗਿ ਲਵੈ ਨ ਲਾਵਣਿਆ ॥੧॥ ਰਹਾਉ ॥
lines.translit: toon meraa parabat toon meraa olaa tum sang lavai na laavaniaa |1| rahaau |
lines.english: You are my mountain, You are my shelter and shield. No one can rival You. ||1||Pause||

lines.gurmukhi: ਤੇਰਾ ਕੀਤਾ ਜਿਸੁ ਲਾਗੈ ਮੀਠਾ ॥
lines.translit: teraa keetaa jis laagai meetthaa |
lines.english: That person, unto whom Your actions seem sweet,

lines.gurmukhi: ਘਟਿ ਘਟਿ ਪਾਰਬ੍ਰਹਮੁ ਤਿਨਿ ਜਨਿ ਡੀਠਾ ॥
lines.translit: ghatt ghatt paarabraham tin jan ddeetthaa |
lines.english: comes to see the Supreme Lord God in each and every heart.

lines.gurmukhi: ਥਾਨਿ ਥਨੰਤਰਿ ਤੂੰਹੈ ਤੂੰਹੈ ਇਕੋ ਇਕੁ ਵਰਤਾਵਣਿਆ ॥੨॥
lines.translit: thaan thanantar toonhai toonhai iko ik varataavaniaa |2|
lines.english: In all places and interspaces, You exist. You are the One and Only Lord, pervading everywhere. ||2||

lines.gurmukhi: ਦਇਆ ਧਾਰਿ ਰਾਖੇ ਤੁਧੁ ਸੇਈ ਪੂਰੈ ਕਰਮਿ ਸਮਾਵਣਿਆ ॥੩॥
lines.translit: deaa dhaar raakhe tudh seee poorai karam samaavaniaa |3|
lines.english: Showering Your Mercy, You protect those who, through perfect destiny, merge into You. ||3||

lines.gurmukhi: ਭਗਤੀ ਭਾਇ ਭਰੇ ਭੰਡਾਰਾ ॥
lines.translit: bhagatee bhaae bhare bhanddaaraa |
lines.english: Your treasures are overflowing with love and devotion.

lines.gurmukhi: ਸਗਲ ਮਨੋਰਥ ਤੂੰ ਦੇਵਣਹਾਰਾ ॥
lines.translit: sagal manorath toon devanahaaraa |
lines.english: You are the Fulfiller of all the mind's desires.
